Experience.title: Professional Experience
cna_desc: Software Engineer in high-performance monorepo architecture and scalable microservices utilizing RabbitMQ.
Building robust APIs utilizing both GraphQL and RESTful patterns.
Deploying and managing containerized Docker environments and Heroku orchestration.
mutant_desc: Developed high-velocity microservices utilizing NestJS and GCP (Pub/Sub, Cloud Functions, Cloud Scheduler).
Pioneered AI-assisted developer tools by deploying custom MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers.
Wrote unit, integration, and E2E test suites with Jest to achieve exceptional coverage.
konatus_desc: Delivered robust full-stack solutions transitioning between backend Node.js, Java (Spring Boot), and frontend Angular.
Demonstrated quick learning curves in high-intensity agile environments.
objective_desc: Built low-latency APIs with Node.js, Express, Joi, Redis, and MongoDB.
Created highly interactive UI features with React, Redux, and TypeScript.
Conducted extensive code reviews and provided decentralized technical leadership in scrum teams.
tecnospeed_desc: Engineered microservices using NestJS and TypeORM with PostgreSQL.
Integrated secure high-volume queuing services using AWS SQS, S3, and CloudWatch.
